meta.title: A tour of SpaceX’s spacesuit!
meta.description:
SpaceX let us get up close and personal with their new spacesuit and I give you a mini tour of all the details! There's a lot more footage to come from our time at SpaceX HQ so stay tuned! 

More pictures and the article here - https://everydayastronaut.com/up-close-and-personal-with-spacexs-space-suit/

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

Show your support, get a chance to win flown hardware and join our  exclusive discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Music by Everyday Astronaut - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut
